description.en: Parameters: angle – a number (integer or float) Turn turtle left by angle units. (Units are by default degrees, but can be set via the degrees() and radians() functions.) Angle orientation depends on the turtle mode, see mode(). >>> turtle.heading() 22.0 >>> turtle.left(45) >>> turtle.heading() 67.0

description.en: Set focus on TurtleScreen (in order to collect key-events). Dummy arguments are provided in order to be able to pass listen() to the onclick method.
